title: Sustainability, hosting + reviewer-rotation/throughput plan
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). A sustainability plan covers hosting, persistent-ID/PURL ownership surviving a steward change, and reviewer rotation/throughput.
objective: Document the sustainability + hosting plan (PURL ownership survives steward change) and a reviewer-rotation/throughput plan.
acceptanceCriteria: Sustainability + hosting plan documented (persistent-ID/PURL ownership survives a steward change).
output: docs/sustainability.md sustainability + reviewer-rotation plan, committed via PR.
